EMAIL_INVALID: Please provide a valid email address
PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least {min} characters long
PASSWORD_WEAK: Password must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
USERNAME_MIN_LENGTH: Username must be at least {min} characters long
USERNAME_INVALID: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores
PHONE_INVALID: Please provide a valid phone number
ARRAY_MIN_SIZE: Array must contain at least {min} items
ARRAY_MAX_SIZE: Array must contain at most {max} items
STRING_MIN_LENGTH: Must be at least {min} characters long
STRING_MAX_LENGTH: Must be at most {max} characters long
NUMBER_MIN: Must be greater than or equal to {min}
NUMBER_MAX: Must be less than or equal to {max}
DATE_PAST: Date must be in the past
DATE_FUTURE: Date must be in the future
